title: Stainless Steel Bat man Car Emblem Decal Badge Fan Batwing Batarang Symbol 3D Auto Badge (Black)
features: Durable Material: Made from premium black stainless steel for a sleek, long-lasting finish.
Iconic Design: Features the instantly recognizable Batman Bat symbol, adding a bold touch to your vehicle.
Easy Installation: Simple adhesive backing for quick and hassle-free application on cars, trucks, or motorcycles.
Size: 8 cm x 3cm (3.15 inches x 1.18 inches)
1 pcs per pack, comes with sticky pad included.
description: The Stainless Steel Bat Batman Car Emblem Decal Badge is a sleek, high-quality automotive accessory designed for Batman fans. Crafted from durable black stainless steel, this emblem features the iconic Bat symbol, adding a bold and stylish touch to your car, truck, or motorcycle. With its weather-resistant finish, it’s built to withstand the elements while giving your vehicle a distinctive, superhero-inspired look. Easy to apply with adhesive backing, this decal badge is perfect for any Batman enthusiast looking to personalize their ride.
